overall.description: Aerial drone footage flying through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves slowly forward between towering skyscrapers illuminated by neon signs and holographic billboards. Flying vehicles occasionally pass through the frame. The scene is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a dark, atmospheric urban environment with the iconic '01' building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cyberpunk city canyon between mega-skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: flying slowly forward through the urban canyon at high altitude, maintaining steady approach toward the central tower

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscraper with illuminated '01' signage near the top, serving as the focal landmark
massive dark glass and steel building forming the left wall of the urban canyon
towering dark structure with scattered lit windows forming the right wall of the canyon
large circular digital billboard on the central tower displaying a woman's face with orange hair
multi-lane road visible at the bottom of the canyon with tiny vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The camera flies slowly forward through a futuristic cyberpunk city canyon at night. Towering mega-skyscrapers flank both sides with the iconic '01' building visible in the distance. A large circular neon billboard illuminates the central tower while the street level sits far below, and the scene is bathed in cool blue artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with aerial traffic

events.description: flying vehicle enters from upper left and traverses horizontally across the canyon
second flying vehicle briefly visible in the upper left distance

agents.ego_description: continuing steady forward flight as the central tower grows larger in the frame, maintaining altitude

notable_agents.action: flying car moving horizontally from left to right across the canyon at high altitude

segments.scene_description: The flight continues deeper into the city canyon as the central '01' tower grows larger and more detailed. Flying cars traverse the canyon at various altitudes, with one passing prominently from left to right. The surrounding mega-skyscrapers appear closer and more imposing as the camera advances toward the heart of the district.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban canyon approaching central tower

events.description: camera slightly descends and tilts downward to reveal more street level detail

agents.ego_description: flying closer to the buildings with slight descent, providing a steeper angle view of the street below

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the central tower closely, with surrounding skyscrapers now filling the frame on both sides and the sky mostly obscured. The neon billboard becomes larger and more prominent as the camera descends slightly, offering a steeper view of the multi-lane street below. The urban canyon feels increasingly enclosed as the flight continues toward the building base.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward flight through a neon-lit urban canyon that gradually tightens as the camera descends toward the heart of a futuristic district. It begins by gliding through a vast expanse of mega-skyscrapers bathed in cool blue artificial light, with the iconic '01' building visible as a distant focal point. As the camera advances deeper into the city, the central tower grows larger and more detailed while flying cars traverse the space at various altitudes, including one passing prominently across the frame. The scene then shifts as the surrounding skyscrapers close in to fill the periphery and obscure the sky, making the environment feel increasingly enclosed. Finally, the camera descends slightly to offer a steeper view of the multi-lane streets below while approaching the base of the tower and its massive, glowing neon billboard.
